caption: A man with a beard and a black baseball cap sits in front of a computer monitor, which is visible in the background. He is wearing a black t-shirt and is positioned in the lower center of the screen, with his face appearing in a small inset window. The majority of the screen is occupied by a website displaying lists of names and numbers, some accompanied by the word "HOLIDAY." On-screen text reads "Don't use this service for giveaways! Use Multi-Round Giveaways instead" along with links for "more info" and buttons labeled "Agree" and "Go Back." The footer includes "© 1998-2021 RANDOM.ORG" and social media prompts. A bright red banner at the bottom says "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a YouTube logo. Between the sequences, the lists of names on the website update, and the text "You have randomized this list X times" increments from 3 to 5 and then to 7.
